flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Chapman University rose 21% between 2007 and 2010 ($12.0k → $14.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Chapman University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.6k → $65.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Chapman University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.6k → $65.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Chapman University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
